title: DistractorAIProposalV1
description: AI-generated pedagogical distractor proposal for a target taxon. Third-priority source after iNaturalist similar species and taxonomic neighbors.

prompt_version.description: Version string of the prompt used to generate this proposal (e.g. 'v1.0').

target_scientific_name.description: Accepted scientific name of the target taxon (echoed from input).

ranked_existing_candidates.description: Existing candidates from sources 1+2 (iNat / taxonomic), re-ranked by AI.

proposed_additional_candidates.description: New candidates proposed by AI not already in existing candidate lists. May include unresolved names — all must pass scientific name validation before use.

overall_notes.description: Optional free-text notes from the AI about this proposal.

scientific_name.description: Scientific name of the candidate distractor. Must be validated against the canonical and referenced taxon pools after receipt.

source_reference.description: Source that originally provided this candidate (e.g. 'inaturalist_similar_species', 'taxonomic_neighbor_same_genus', 'ai_proposal').

rank.description: Rank within this proposal list (1 = most pedagogically useful).

reason.description: Pedagogical justification for including this candidate.

confidence.description: AI confidence in this specific candidate [0.0, 1.0].
